# Feature Quality Control

Data department often gets told that properties with a certain characteristic are not having estimated values that accurately reflect their values. This report provides a basic investigation of these properties.

```{r}
library(DT)
library(DBI)
library(ccao)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(leaflet)
library(noctua)

noctua_options(cache_size = 10, unload = FALSE)

AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA <- dbConnect(noctua::athena(),
  rstudio_conn_tab = FALSE
)
```

## Ratio Stats for Features based on threshold of `r params$threshold`

```{r ratio_stats_report_cleaning, results='asis'}
# --- Params ---
run_ids <- params$run_id$run_id
features <- params$features
threshold <- params$threshold

# Derive years from run_id
run_year <- as.integer(substr(run_ids[1], 1, 4))
sale_year <- as.character(run_year - 1)
input_year <- sale_year

# Build run_id IN clause
run_id_str <- paste0("'", run_ids, "'", collapse = ", ")

# Build feature columns for SELECT
feature_cols <- paste(paste0("input.", features), collapse = ",\n    ")

# --- Query ---
query <- glue::glue("
  WITH latest_sales AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
      SELECT
        pin,
        CAST(sale_price AS int) AS sale_price,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pin ORDER BY sale_date DESC) AS rn
      FROM default.vw_pin_sale
      WHERE year = '{sale_year}'
        AND NOT is_multisale
        AND NOT sale_filter_deed_type
        AND NOT sale_filter_less_than_10k
        AND NOT sale_filter_same_sale_within_365
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
  )
  SELECT
    ap.meta_pin AS pin,
    ap.meta_class AS class,
    ap.meta_nbhd_code AS nbhd_code,
    ap.pred_pin_final_fmv,
    s.sale_price,
    {feature_cols}
  FROM model.assessment_pin ap
  LEFT JOIN latest_sales s
    ON ap.meta_pin = s.pin
  LEFT JOIN model.vw_pin_shared_input AS input
    ON CAST(ap.meta_pin AS VARCHAR) = CAST(input.meta_pin AS VARCHAR)
    AND input.meta_year = '{input_year}'
  WHERE ap.run_id IN ({run_id_str})
")

# --- Fetch & compute ratio ---
values <- dbGetQuery(AWS_ATHENA_CONN_NOCTUA, query) %>%
  mutate(ratio = pred_pin_final_fmv / sale_price) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sale_price))

# --- Stats function ---
compute_stats <- function(df, label) {
  tibble::tibble(
    group        = label,
    prb          = ccao::ccao_prb(df$sale_price, df$pred_pin_final_fmv)[1],
    prd          = ccao::ccao_prd(df$sale_price, df$pred_pin_final_fmv)[1],
    cod          = ccao::ccao_cod(df$sale_price / df$pred_pin_final_fmv)[1],
    median_ratio = median(df$ratio)
  )
}
```


```{r ratio_stats_report, results='asis'}
# --- Render tabset ---
cat("::: {.panel-tabset}\n\n")

for (feat in features) {
  cat(glue::glue("## {feat}\n\n"))

  near <- values %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[feat]]), .data[[feat]] < threshold,
      !is.na(sale_price), !is.na(pred_pin_final_fmv)
    )
  far <- values %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[feat]]), .data[[feat]] >= threshold,
      !is.na(sale_price), !is.na(pred_pin_final_fmv)
    )

  results <- bind_rows(
    compute_stats(near, glue::glue("Near (< {threshold})")),
    compute_stats(far, glue::glue("Far (>= {threshold})"))
  )

  print(
    datatable(results, rownames = FALSE, options = list(pageLength = 5)) %>%
      formatRound(columns = c("prb", "prd", "cod", "median_ratio"), digits = 3)
  )

  cat("\n\n")
}
cat(":::\n")
```
